items.title: Who has scored the most World Cup goals in history?

items.title: Meet the glamorous Spanish Wag and former volleyball player who will be cheering on Argentina in World Cup final
items.summary: LIONEL SCALONI has made Argentina a force to be reckoned with in international.ootball. The 48-year-old took over as Argentina boss in 2018, but since then has guided them to two Copa America titles and the 2022 World Cup with the chance of winning it back to back at the New York New Jersey Stadium
